creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of graphics/ImageMagick

diff -urN graphics/ImageMagick/pkg/DESCR.orig graphics/ImageMagick/pkg/DESCR
--- graphics/ImageMagick/pkg/DESCR.orig Fri Jan 21 09:54:16 2000
+++ graphics/ImageMagick/pkg/DESCR      Fri Jan 21 09:54:32 2000
@@ -3,3 +3,5 @@
 annotation, compositing, animation, and creating montages.  ImageMagick
 can read and write many of the more popular image formats (e.g. JPEG,
 TIFF, PNM, XPM, Photo CD, etc.).
+
+WWW: http://www.imagemagick.org/
